benchmark.objective: Research and create a truthful, captivating GitHub profile README from the frozen concise and extended CV PDFs.
benchmark.notes: Initialized from the existing run-folder cohort and frozen v1 prompt/rubric. Legacy runs have no pre-existing 11ai audit or evidence bundle.

checks.name: configuration-and-cycle
checks.detail: Benchmark configuration and frozen cycle validate.

checks.name: run-membership-and-audits
checks.detail: All 26 frozen runs are complete and have passing audits.

checks.name: judging-completeness
checks.detail: One complete AI judge artifact covers all 26 anonymized runs and six rubric dimensions.

checks.name: aggregate-integrity
checks.detail: Aggregate was rebuilt from the complete judge artifact and validates.

checks.name: evidence-integrity
checks.detail: Anonymized source artifacts and final desktop/mobile evidence hashes validate.

checks.name: accounting-reconciliation
checks.detail: 49 discovered local transcript threads reconcile; token and cost values are explicitly unavailable.

checks.name: publication-metadata
checks.detail: Interim release metadata and open campaign plan are present.

limitations: The legacy cohort had no pre-existing accounting artifacts; 49 matching local transcript files were discovered and reconciled, but no usable token-count events were available.
Mobile full-page browser stitching duplicated content; clean top-viewport captures were used for visible judging.
No second compatible benchmark or historical reviewed cycle was available for cross-benchmark analysis.
